intended_use: icobrain is intended for automatic labeling, visualization and volumetric quantification of segmentable brain structures from a set of MR images. This software is intended to automate the current manu
intended_use_full: icobrain is intended for automatic labeling, visualization and volumetric quantification of segmentable brain structures from a set of MR images. This software is intended to automate the current manual process of identifying, labeling and quantifying the volume of segmentable brain structures identified on MR images.
target_condition: Conditions affecting brain volume (e.g., Alzheimer's disease, multiple sclerosis, traumatic brain injury, depression)
ground_truth: Simulated and/or manually labeled ground truth volumes/volume changes; test-retest image datasets
other_metrics: Pearson correlation coefficient: 0.90 (averaged over all experiments); Intraclass correlation coefficient: 0.89 (averaged over all experiments)
